Project TAMARIND — Indicative Term Sheet for Proposed Acquisition by Meridian Refractives Ltd. (SGX-ST Mainboard; stock code: MRL.Z1) of 70% of Prismatech Sensors Pte. Ltd.
Parties: Buyer — Meridian Refractives Ltd.; Seller — Harbour Kinetics Pte. Ltd.; Target — Prismatech Sensors Pte. Ltd.; Financial adviser — Arcadia Crest Capital (Singapore) Pte. Ltd.
Structure: Purchase of 70% of Target’s issued shares; consideration partly in cash and partly in new MRL shares to be issued under Rule 806 general mandate, subject to SGX-ST no-objection and RegCo guidance where required.
Consideration: S$78,500,000 (S$45,000,000 cash; balance satisfied by issuing up to 38,000,000 new MRL shares at a price not more than 10% discount to 30-day VWAP, subject to compliance with the SGX Listing Manual and any shareholder approval if Rule 805(1) limit is exceeded).
Issuer-relative materiality: The Parties acknowledge that the transaction classification will be assessed under Rule 1006; if any relative figure equals or exceeds 25%, approval under Rule 1014/1015 will be sought and announcement will be made immediately via S G X N E T once the terms are definitive or if confidentiality is no longer preserved under Rule 703.
Conditions precedent: confirmatory due diligence; SGX-ST’s in-principle approval for listing and quotation of consideration shares; any SIC/Take-over Code notifications; no prohibition by MAS or any court; customary corporate approvals of both Buyer and Seller.
MNPI handling and selective disclosure: This term sheet and ongoing negotiations comprise information that is not generally available and reasonably expected to have a material effect on MRL’s securities; disclosure to external parties is on a need-to-know basis only, with insider lists maintained and controls aligned to SFA and SGX Listing Rule 703.
Blackout/closed periods and dealing restrictions: MRL personnel and advisers privy to this matter must observe the issuer’s securities dealing policy and refrain from trading during closed periods and any ad hoc blackout windows; any inadvertent selective disclosure or market speculation will trigger an immediate holding statement and confirmation announcement on SGXNET.
Public-status check: Reference is made to MRL’s SGXNET announcement dated 02‑01‑2026 titled “Strategic Review Update” and FY2023 Annual Report (pp. 12–15) which disclosed a general intent to pursue bolt-on acquisitions; those documents are already public and do not, on their own, render this specific proposal generally available.
Timetable: Signing targeted within 6 weeks of this term sheet; long-stop date 31‑08‑2026; completion to occur 5 business days after satisfaction of CPs; Buyer to consult SGX RegCo without delay if there is uncertainty on timing of public disclosure or if rumour/leak renders confidentiality impracticable.
Exclusivity and standstill: 60 days from countersignature; Target and Seller shall not solicit or enter into any competing proposal; for the avoidance of doubt, ordinary-course product announcements (e.g., SkyLumen v4.2 firmware notes) are not restricted and are not deemed material to MRL.
Termination and MAC: No material adverse change termination right shall apply; macroeconomic shifts, industry-wide cost inflation, or general press commentary shall not constitute a MAC, and mere publication of sector reports (e.g., “Industry Metrics Quarterly Q3 2025”) shall not affect the Parties’ obligations.
Contacts: Ms. Raina Quen, General Counsel, Meridian Refractives Ltd., +65 6 8 7 3  4 2 1 0; raina.quen@meridianrefractives.sg; back-up: Mr. Daxley Kho, Arcadia Crest Capital, daxley.kho@arcadiacrest.capital.
Deal refs and filing pointers: Deal Code PRJ‑Tmrnd/MA—SG—2 6 : 0 1; internal ref INV/0xA9F‑Σ; draft announcement link http://sgxnet.sgx.com/announcements/ZX‑ANN‑0 2 0 1 2 6 and http://intranet.mrl.local/projects/tamarind/term‑sheet (do not forward outside).
Compliance note: Any announcement will be made “immediately” as defined by the SGX Listing Manual (as soon as reasonably practicable) and in any case no later than when the Board approves a binding SPA; where confidentiality is preserved and negotiations are still incomplete, disclosure may be deferred, subject to Rule 703 and guidance from SGX RegCo.
pm note: update tracker before eod; refresh the data room index; this line is operational only and not part of the transaction terms.
